hero-subtitle: Full Stack Developer / Game Designer & Developer
hero-desc:
Expert specialized in multiple architectures, being a self-taught individual for any task and flexible to adapt to all work methodologies. Accustomed to learning new technologies quickly and effectively, allowing to create real progress within any project.
When a problem arises, I automatically seek the solution. I stand out for being communicative, creating a fluid and comfortable work environment. My career and projects back my skills.
edu1-title: Master's Degree in Game Design and Development
edu1-bullet1: Specialized training across all areas of video game development.
edu1-bullet2: Self-taught methodology based on trial and error.
edu1-bullet3: Active presence in Game Jams working with several multidisciplinary teams.
edu2-title: Higher Degree in 3D Animation, Games and Interactive Environments
edu2-bullet1: Learning to generate and adapt any multimedia project for the market.
edu2-bullet2: Creation of interactive environments, as well as their optimization.
edu2-bullet3: Development of interactive applications and dynamic web environments.
edu3-title: Higher Degree in Network Computer Systems Administration (A.S.I.R.)
edu3-bullet1: Planning and construction of technological infrastructures, networks, and servers.
edu3-bullet2: Creation and development of users and operating systems such as Windows or Linux.
edu3-bullet3: Management of relational databases with techniques to protect information.
exp1-title: Unity Designer and Programmer | Co-founder of Drille Studio
exp1-bullet1: Coordinated and led a multidisciplinary team, designing and implementing agile methodologies via Trello to ensure an efficient, flexible workflow tailored to project needs.
exp1-bullet2: Designed and implemented complex mechanics and systems applying design patterns and highly efficient Clean Code practices.
exp1-bullet3: Researched and adopted new emerging technologies, ensuring the competitiveness of the technical stack according to current market demands.
exp1-bullet4: Managed workflow and code integration through version control with Git, ensuring the stability of project branches.
exp1-bullet5: Performed debugging and code refactoring tasks, successfully improving project performance by up to 75%.
exp2-bullet1: Researched and resolved months-old legacy bugs, optimizing system speed and accelerating the overall project development workflow.
exp2-bullet2: Gained solid experience coordinating complex architectures alongside a team of senior developers, adapting to high-impact project standards.
exp2-bullet3: Led critical testing sessions to identify bottlenecks and vulnerabilities, offloading workload from the technical team so they could focus on the core business.
exp2-bullet4: Evaluated, analyzed, and implemented new technologies and tools within the project ecosystem, ensuring scalable and efficient long-term technical decisions.
exp2-bullet5: Actively participated in daily meetings (Daily Stands) to prioritize critical tasks, ensuring continuous progress aligned with delivery goals.
exp3-bullet1: Applied advanced technical solutions for the deployment of dynamic, interactive, and scalable web environments.
exp3-bullet2: Translated complex graphical models and corporate style guides into real web interfaces using modern HTML5 and CSS3, guaranteeing high design fidelity for clients.
exp3-bullet3: Implemented load optimization and code performance strategies, transforming web portals into smooth, functional platforms focused on user experience (UX).
exp3-bullet4: Participated in daily meetings oriented to goal tracking, early blockage diagnosis, and ideation of new functionalities for active projects.
exp4-bullet1: Designed and structured software solutions using a custom-tailored internal program, directly aligning the technical architecture with business goals and specific requirements of each client.
exp4-bullet2: Increased organic positioning and web platform performance by applying advanced techniques of load optimization, code structure, data analysis, and keywords.
exp4-bullet3: Diagnosed and resolved critical incidents, both technical and functional, ensuring high system availability and guaranteeing an excellent support service.
p1-desc-intro: 2.5D platformer shooter developed in Unity where I acted as technical leader in my team Drille Studio.
p1-desc-extra:
I designed the goal-oriented work methodology and integrated the workflows of the different departments, ensuring a successful delivery and optimizing overall productivity.
Likewise, I designed and developed the global technical architecture, including dynamic aiming systems, obstacle mechanics, and advanced artificial intelligence for enemies and final bosses. The project concluded with an intensive debugging phase that drastically boosted product performance.
p2-desc-intro: 3D puzzle video game programmed in C# and developed by a multidisciplinary team of 8 professionals.
p2-desc-extra:
The project demonstrated a high competitive level, successfully positioning itself among the top 8 standout video games of the VI Cultura Abierta Game Jam.

My role focused on software engineering, developing the character's physics system, logical environment interaction, and a dynamic exhibition room with unlockable rewards. The entire codebase was refactored to ensure a smooth and optimized experience.
p3-desc-intro: 3D wave-based survival Twin-Stick Shooter developed entirely in a self-taught manner.
p3-desc-extra:
This individual technical project allowed me to autonomously manage the entire software lifecycle, from conceptualizing core mechanics to art direction and game deployment.

During development, I implemented advanced data persistence systems focused on achievements and a skill tree with an integrated shop. The result is an interactive audiovisual experience with polished mechanics that consolidated my expertise in Unity systems architecture.
